Title: Verify manual vehicle insertion
Preconditions: Application is running; User is registered; Vehicle not found
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Register a user
3. Attempt to add a vehicle that does not exist
4. Enter the manually inserted vehicle data
Expected Result: The system adds the new vehicle to the list.

Title: Verify no other vehicles
Preconditions: Application is running; User is registered; Only one vehicle exists
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Register a user
3. Add a vehicle to the list
4. Attempt to add another vehicle
Expected Result: The system does not allow the user to add another vehicle since there is only one in the list.

Title: Verify user registration check (negative)
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Attempt to register with invalid user data
Expected Result: The system does not allow the user to register.

Title: Verify vehicle search (negative)
Preconditions: Application is running; User is registered
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Register a user
3. Attempt to add a vehicle with invalid data
Expected Result: The system does not find the vehicle and allows the user to manually insert it.

Title: Verify manual vehicle insertion (negative)
Preconditions: Application is running; User is registered; Vehicle not found
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Register a user
3. Attempt to add a vehicle that does not exist
4. Enter invalid vehicle data
Expected Result: The system does not add the new vehicle to the list.
